data.content: Root cause is split across both doctor paths: checkPromptGuidance compares raw prompt-profile markers against canonical workflow profile IDs, and the prompt-guidance fixer appends static template content that can be missing or legacy-profiled on the next run. Plan is to reuse exported workflow profile normalization, parse/update only the managed guidance block, and make prompt-guidance fixes render the expected canonical profile dynamically before replacing the block in place. Tests should cover legacy alias acceptance, genuine mismatches, knots/beads fix rendering, and idempotent replacement instead of duplicate appends.
